# three.ws

> three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.

Tagline: Give your AI a body.
Site: https://three.ws
Source: https://github.com/nirholas/three.ws
Contact: https://x.com/trythreews

## Main

Entry points into the product.

- [Home](https://three.ws/): Landing page. Pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.
- [Discover](https://three.ws/discover): On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.
- [Avatar Gallery](https://three.ws/gallery): Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.
- [Marketplace](https://three.ws/marketplace): Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.
- [Community](https://three.ws/community): Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.
- [Sitemap](https://three.ws/sitemap): Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

## Build

Create and customize an agent.

- [Create Agent](https://three.ws/create): Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.
- [Viewer](https://three.ws/app): Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.
- [glTF Validator](https://three.ws/validation): Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.
- [Widget Studio](https://three.ws/studio): Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.
- [Artifact Viewer](https://three.ws/artifact): Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.
- [Widgets Gallery](https://three.ws/widgets): Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.
- [Hydrate](https://three.ws/hydrate): Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

## Crypto

On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

- [Pay (x402)](https://three.ws/pay): Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.
- [Pump.fun Stream](https://three.ws/pumpfun): Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.
- [Pump Live](https://three.ws/pump-live): Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.
- [Pump Dashboard](https://three.ws/pump-dashboard): Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.
- [Strategy Lab](https://three.ws/strategy-lab): Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.
- [Solana Vanity Wallet](https://three.ws/vanity-wallet): Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.
- [ETH Vanity (CREATE2)](https://three.ws/eth-vanity): Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

## Agent Tools

Manage, talk to, and deploy individual agents.

- [Chat](https://three.ws/chat): Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.
- [Agent Home](https://three.ws/agent): Default landing for an agent instance — chat, embed, and remix actions.
- [Agents Index](https://three.ws/agents): Browse every registered agent on three.ws.
- [Reputation Explorer](https://three.ws/reputation): Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

## Account

Sign-in, dashboard, billing.

- [Sign in](https://three.ws/login): Sign in with email, GitHub, or a connected wallet.
- [Create account](https://three.ws/register): Create a new three.ws account.
- [Forgot password](https://three.ws/forgot-password): Request a password-reset email.

## Learn

Docs, tutorials, and reference.

- [Docs](https://three.ws/docs): Full documentation: SDKs, API reference, embedding, agent system, smart contracts.
- [Docs · Quick Start](https://three.ws/docs/quick-start): Five-minute walkthrough: create an agent, embed it, get a paid call.
- [Docs · Agent System](https://three.ws/docs/agent-system): How agents, avatars, skills, and memories fit together.
- [Docs · ERC-8004](https://three.ws/docs/erc8004): Reference for the on-chain agent identity standard.
- [Docs · Embedding](https://three.ws/docs/embedding): Embed an agent via iframe, oEmbed, or the <agent-3d> web component.
- [Docs · <agent-3d>](https://three.ws/docs/web-component): Reference for the <agent-3d> custom element.
- [Docs · MCP](https://three.ws/docs/mcp): Expose your agent as an MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other clients.
- [Docs · Skills](https://three.ws/docs/skills): Write, package, and monetize agent skills.
- [Docs · Widgets](https://three.ws/docs/widgets): Build and publish reusable chat and 3D widgets.
- [Docs · API Reference](https://three.ws/docs/api-reference): Full HTTP API reference.
- [Docs · SDK](https://three.ws/docs/sdk): JavaScript / Node SDK for three.ws.
- [Tutorials](https://three.ws/tutorials): Step-by-step build guides.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://three.ws/legal/privacy): How three.ws handles user data.
- [Terms of Use](https://three.ws/legal/tos): Terms of service for three.ws.
